title: Accidents
content:
There once was a lady from Guam,
     Who said, "Now the sea is so calm
        I will swim, for a lark";
        But she met with a shark.
     Let us now sing the ninetieth psalm.
meaning:
"Accidents" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
